post_title: Platinum Blue Diamond Discus - Champion Bloodline
post_content:
We are proud to present this exceptional Platinum Blue Diamond Discus from our exclusive champion bloodline. This stunning specimen represents years of selective breeding to achieve the perfect combination of color, pattern, and form that discus enthusiasts prize.

Specimen Details

  • Size: 5.5 inches (14 cm) diameter
  • Age: 18 months
  • Origin: Captive bred from our champion bloodline
  • Pattern: Platinum Blue Diamond with exceptional blue pearling
  • Body Shape: Round with excellent proportions
  • Fins: Perfect symmetry with no deformities
  • Health: Excellent condition, actively feeding and displaying vibrant colors

Genetic Background

This specimen comes from our exclusive breeding program that combines the finest Blue Diamond genetics with our award-winning Platinum line. The parent fish have won multiple awards at international discus competitions, including Best in Show at the 2024 International Discus Championship.

The genetic stability of this line ensures that the exceptional coloration and pattern will remain consistent throughout the fish's life, making it an outstanding addition to any discus collection or breeding program.

Care Requirements

  • Tank Size: Minimum 50 gallons for a small group
  • Water Parameters: Temperature 82-86°F (28-30°C), pH 6.0-7.0, very soft water (GH 1-4)
  • Diet: High-quality discus pellets, frozen bloodworms, beef heart mix, and other protein-rich foods
  • Compatibility: Best kept with other discus or peaceful community fish that tolerate high temperatures

Auction Details

  • Starting Bid: $250.00
  • Reserve Price: $400.00
  • Minimum Bid Increment: $25.00
  • Auction End Date: August 18, 2025, 8:00 PM EST

Shipping Information

This specimen will be carefully packaged in an insulated container with heat packs (during cold weather) or cooling packs (during hot weather) to maintain optimal temperature during transit. We ship via overnight delivery only to ensure the fish arrives in excellent condition.

Note: Live arrival guarantee applies when following our acclimation instructions. Please ensure someone is available to receive the package on the delivery date.

Terms and Conditions

  • Payment must be received within 24 hours of auction end
  • Shipping will be arranged within 3 business days after payment is received
  • Buyer is responsible for shipping costs
  • Local pickup is available at our facility in Coral City, FL
  • International shipping is not available for this auction

Don't miss this opportunity to add a truly exceptional specimen to your collection. Place your bid now!
post_excerpt: Bid on this exceptional Platinum Blue Diamond Discus from our champion bloodline. This 5.5-inch specimen features stunning blue pearling, perfect form, and exceptional genetics from award-winning parent stock.

post_title: Pair of Show Quality Koi Galaxy Betta
post_content:
This auction features an exceptional breeding pair of Koi Galaxy Betta fish (Betta splendens) with extraordinary coloration and finnage. These premium specimens have been carefully selected from our exclusive breeding program and represent the highest quality in ornamental betta varieties.

Male Specimen Details

  • Size: 2.75 inches (7 cm) total length
  • Age: 10 months
  • Pattern: Koi Galaxy with vibrant red, black, and blue marbling over white base
  • Finnage: Halfmoon with 180° caudal spread, perfect symmetry
  • Special Features: Metallic blue scales scattered throughout body, creating a galaxy effect

Female Specimen Details

  • Size: 2.25 inches (5.7 cm) total length
  • Age: 9 months
  • Pattern: Koi Galaxy with complementary red, black, and blue marbling
  • Finnage: Halfmoon with exceptional dorsal development
  • Special Features: Strong egg-layer with proven breeding history

Genetic Background

This pair comes from our specialized breeding program that has focused on developing the Koi Galaxy pattern while maintaining excellent form and finnage. Both specimens are F2 generation from our award-winning bloodlines, with genetics carefully selected for color stability, pattern quality, and form.

The male's lineage includes our Grand Champion from the 2024 International Betta Competition, while the female comes from our most prolific and colorful breeding line. This pair has been conditioned for breeding and is ready to produce exceptional offspring with proper care.

Care Requirements

  • Tank Size: Minimum 5 gallons for individual housing, 20+ gallons for breeding setup
  • Water Parameters: Temperature 78-82°F (25.5-28°C), pH 6.5-7.5, soft to medium hardness
  • Diet: High-quality betta pellets, frozen or live foods (bloodworms, brine shrimp, daphnia)
  • Special Notes: Males must be housed separately from other bettas and most other fish species

Breeding Potential

This pair has been carefully selected for their breeding potential and complementary genetics. With proper conditioning and breeding setup, they can produce spectacular fry with excellent color patterns and form. We estimate a typical spawn size of 100-200 fry with proper care.

For serious breeders, this pair represents an opportunity to establish a high-quality Koi Galaxy line with exceptional color intensity and pattern distribution.

Auction Details

  • Starting Bid: $150.00
  • Reserve Price: $250.00
  • Minimum Bid Increment: $15.00
  • Auction End Date: August 15, 2025, 9:00 PM EST

Shipping Information

These specimens will be carefully packaged in insulated containers with heat packs (during cold weather) to maintain optimal temperature during transit. Each fish will be individually bagged with ample water and oxygen. We ship via overnight delivery only to ensure the fish arrive in excellent condition.

Note: Live arrival guarantee applies when following our acclimation instructions. Please ensure someone is available to receive the package on the delivery date.

Terms and Conditions

  • Payment must be received within 24 hours of auction end
  • Shipping will be arranged within 3 business days after payment is received
  • Buyer is responsible for shipping costs
  • Local pickup is available at our facility in Coral City, FL
  • International shipping is not available for this auction

This is a rare opportunity to acquire a premium breeding pair with exceptional genetics and show-quality characteristics. Place your bid now to add these stunning specimens to your collection or breeding program!
post_excerpt: Bid on this exceptional breeding pair of Koi Galaxy Betta fish featuring extraordinary coloration, perfect finnage, and premium genetics. Ideal for serious collectors and breeders seeking to establish a high-quality bloodline.

post_title: Rare Black Phantom Angelfish Pair - F1 Wild Descendants
post_content:
We are excited to offer this exceptional pair of Black Phantom Angelfish (Pterophyllum scalare), direct F1 descendants from wild-caught specimens collected from the Rio Negro basin. These rare angelfish display the coveted Black Phantom pattern that is highly sought after by serious collectors and breeders.

Specimen Details

  • Size: Male - 4.5 inches (11.4 cm), Female - 4 inches (10.2 cm) body height
  • Age: Approximately 14 months
  • Pattern: Black Phantom - deep black body with subtle gold/silver iridescence
  • Fins: Long, flowing fins with perfect symmetry and no deformities
  • Origin: F1 offspring from wild-caught Rio Negro specimens
  • Health: Excellent condition, actively feeding and displaying natural behaviors

Genetic Background

These Black Phantom Angelfish are F1 descendants from wild specimens collected during our 2023 expedition to the Rio Negro basin in Brazil. The parent fish were carefully selected for their exceptional coloration, size, and vigor, representing the finest examples of wild Black Phantom genetics.

Unlike many commercially bred angelfish, these specimens retain the robust genetics, natural behaviors, and distinctive coloration of their wild ancestors. The Black Phantom variety is particularly rare in the hobby, making this pair an exceptional opportunity for collectors and breeders.

Breeding Potential

This established pair has successfully spawned twice in our facility, producing viable fry with excellent growth rates and color development. With proper conditioning and spawning setup, they can produce 200-300 eggs per spawn.

For serious breeders, this pair represents a rare opportunity to work with near-wild genetics and establish a high-quality Black Phantom bloodline. Their offspring would be highly desirable in the specialty angelfish market.

Care Requirements

  • Tank Size: Minimum 40 gallons for the pair, 75+ gallons recommended
  • Water Parameters: Temperature 78-82°F (25.5-28°C), pH 6.0-7.0, soft water (GH 3-8)
  • Diet: Quality flake food, frozen bloodworms, brine shrimp, and other protein-rich foods
  • Compatibility: Can be kept with peaceful community fish of similar size and water requirements

Auction Details

  • Starting Bid: $200.00
  • Reserve Price: $350.00
  • Minimum Bid Increment: $20.00
  • Auction End Date: August 20, 2025, 7:00 PM EST

Shipping Information

This pair will be carefully packaged in an insulated container with heat packs (during cold weather) or cooling packs (during hot weather) to maintain optimal temperature during transit. We ship via overnight delivery only to ensure the fish arrive in excellent condition.

Note: Live arrival guarantee applies when following our acclimation instructions. Please ensure someone is available to receive the package on the delivery date.

Terms and Conditions

  • Payment must be received within 24 hours of auction end
  • Shipping will be arranged within 3 business days after payment is received
  • Buyer is responsible for shipping costs
  • Local pickup is available at our facility in Coral City, FL
  • International shipping is not available for this auction

Don't miss this rare opportunity to acquire a proven breeding pair of Black Phantom Angelfish with exceptional genetics and breeding potential. Place your bid now!
post_excerpt: Bid on this rare breeding pair of Black Phantom Angelfish, F1 descendants from wild Rio Negro specimens. These exceptional fish feature deep black coloration with subtle iridescence and perfect finnage.
